title: Singapore roles: higher Product/UX concentration, more senior distribution
summary: Singapore employment is more formalised with 87.4% full-time (vs 79.3% regional), 9.8% contract, and only 1.7% freelance. Career levels: Mid-level IC 32.2% (vs 42.6% regional), Senior IC 25.9% (vs 20.5%), Leadership 11.5% combined (vs 5.9%). Primary fields: Product/UX 69.5% (significantly above regional), Marketing 6.9%, Visual/UI 6.3%. Design leadership at 5.2% (vs 3.7% regional).
methodology: Self-reported employment type, career level, and primary field of work in anonymous online survey, filtered to Singapore-based respondents
